expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: cross-section interaction audit catches template x pause-mode and prompt-editor-open states
expectations.evidence: The result.md explicitly restates the benchmark focus and addresses both required items: “Benchmark focus (blocking): ‘cross-section interaction audit catches template × pause-mode and prompt-editor-open states.’” It then provides specific evidence for prompt-editor-open (BCIN-7708) and template+pause-mode gap/transition omission (BCIN-7730) and ties them to Phase 5a interaction/state coverage expectations.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: The output is explicitly framed as phase5a and evaluates the phase5a checkpoint: result.md begins “P5A-INTERACTION-AUDIT-001 (BCIN-7289, phase5a)” and states “Phase/Checkpoint: phase5a — Cross-Section Interaction Audit,” and it quotes phase5a rubric requirements from `review-rubric-phase5a.md` and concludes “This result is explicitly phase5a-aligned.”
